name: James Mackler
subject: One more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I know you've heard a lot from me and my team the past few days. I promise I'll be quick.
| |
---
| |
---
| Hey friends. I know you've heard a lot from me and my team the past few days. I promise I'll be quick. The first FEC deadline of the campaign is just 4 hours away. We've had a successful weekend so far, but we're still $605 short of our goal. I hate asking for money all the time. But it's the reality of modern campaigns. If we want to flip this seat and bring our common-sense values to Washington, [**_I need grassroots supporters like you to give._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e4/1983716468/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190331pm?refcode=jme190331pm_m&recurring=true") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e5/1983716468/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTAzMzFwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190331pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme190331pm_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $21](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e2/1983716468/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTAzMzFwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190331pm?express_lane=true&amount=21&refcode=jme190331pm_m_&refcode2=107423#")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e3/1983716468/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTAzMzFwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190331pm?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jme190331pm_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e0/1983716468/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTAzMzFwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190331pm?refcode=jme190331pm_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
This campaign belongs to supporters like you all. I'm not accepting a cent of corporate PAC money -- I'm accountable only to the people of Tennessee, and relying exclusively on you as well.
[**_We only need $605 more before midnight to reach our FEC goal. Please, chip in._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e4/1983716468/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190331pm?refcode=jme190331pm_m&recurring=true")
I sincerely appreciate every dollar that comes through our (virtual) door. Thank you for being on this journey with me.
James
Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. SenateJames Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2fd/18d6a294/490fcefa/26d6a9e1/1983716468/VEsB/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe

name: Gillibrand (personal)
subject: just hours
body:
Last call--I'm counting on your help right now.
Peter, I need your help. We just passed the deadline for our founding member drive, but we didn't hit the goal--so we extended the deadline by just a few hours so I could ask you for help. Your first donation to this campaign could put us over the top in time and make the difference when everyone sees our FEC numbers. **291 more donations to go --[please, donate in these final few hours before the deadline to become a founding member, help us make the debate stage and power this people-first campaign to defeat Trump. No corporate PACs, no fossil fuel companies, no federal lobbyists, no super PACs--I'm counting on you right now.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d6c/2ae112ef/6ca62212/357dbe34/1885858038/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5OTgtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2998-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Here's the link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d6c/2ae112ef/6ca62212/357dbe34/1885858038/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5OTgtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2998-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks so much,
Kirsten
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gavrie, Team Gillibrand
Date: Sat, Mar 30, 2019
Subject: real quick
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d6c/2ae112ef/6ca62212/357dbe34/1885858038/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5OTgtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2998-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Can you confirm something real quick, Peter?
Kirsten emailed a few days ago asking you to become a founding member of our campaign, and it looks like you haven't donated yet. Time's running out before tomorrow's FEC deadline, and we still need 942 more people to step up and give. We can't make our goal without you: **[Donate right now--before the critical FEC deadline--to become a founding member, get Kirsten on the debate stage and help power this campaign forward to defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d6c/2ae112ef/6ca62212/357dbe34/1885858038/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5OTgtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2998-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
The first FEC filing sets the tone for the rest of the campaign. We have a steep uphill battle ahead of us, but hitting our goal and having you on board means this: Kirsten can campaign in more early states. We can build the strongest volunteer teams to connect with more voters. We can spread our message by securing Kirsten's spot on the national debate stage.
It all has to start now. It has to start with you chipping in to hit our goal and power this movement. **We need 942 more people to give to hit our huge FEC filing deadline at midnight tomorrow --and every membership gets Kirsten one step closer to the debate stage.** **[Donate $5 or more right now to become a founding member, hit our FEC goal and get Kirsten on the debate stage. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no fossil fuel companies, no super PACs--we're counting on you.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d6c/2ae112ef/6ca62212/357dbe34/1885858038/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5OTgtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2998-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for being brave with us,
Gavrie Kullman
Digital Fundraising Director
Gillibrand 2020
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d6c/2ae112ef/6ca62212/357dbe37/1885858038/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Debbie
subject: sorry, I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | I know your inbox is flooded at this point, but it's because we need your help more than ever. Missing this fundraising goal is not an option. Just $435 more to go before midnight. Help us end our first FEC deadline of the year strong.

[**_https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/EOQ-Match_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c0f/622b7b5b/1f33ad52/307b44fa/898522059/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-march19eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190331_4_13&amount=10&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomEOQM&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190331_4_13&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190331_4_13")

Thanks so much for all you do,

Debbie

As we head towards a major milestone, I’ve spent the last few days
reflecting on our campaign, and I wanted to share how proud I am of what
we’ve accomplished.

Together, we are building a movement of people who are determined to fight
-- not just AGAINST the policies of this president and his Administration,
but FOR a better America.

Our fight is far from over -- in fact, it’s just getting started. And if
we’re going to sustain a winning campaign, I need to know that you’re in
my corner.

We’re so close to our first major FEC filing deadline at midnight tonight
-- trust me, I’m counting down the hours in anticipation. It isn’t too
late to pitch in your first contribution to become a Founding
Donor:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Bernie 2020
subject: Before midnight:
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=920%2E150750%2EtmrhD3)

Friends -
We’re racing toward midnight with one eye on the clock and the other one on the computer as we watch the number of donations we’ve received race upward every few minutes.
Time is running out. This is our last chance — the last time we’ll ask before this deadline. We’re trying to report as many individual donations as we can. So we’re asking:
Can you make a donation to our campaign before it’s too late? Use this link:
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/deadline_day**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190331-5-90-120&t=2&akid=920%2E150750%2EtmrhD3)
Thank you again. We’re going to report a number we can all be very proud of.
\- Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe using this link**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=920%2E150750%2EtmrhD3). If you want to receive fewer emails, [just tell us here](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=920%2E150750%2EtmrhD3). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

We have an official FEC fundraising deadline coming up and we're trying to report as many individual donations as we possibly can. [**Make a contribution today before the FEC deadline comes to a close.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer-march-deadline&t=5&refcode2=920_150750_tmrhD3&akid=920%2E150750%2EtmrhD3)
clean_body: Friends - We’re racing toward midnight with one eye on the clock and the other one on the computer as we watch the number of donations we’ve received race upward every few minutes. Time is running out. This is our last chance — the last time we’ll ask before this deadline. We’re trying to report as many individual donations as we can. So we’re asking: Can you make a donation to our campaign before it’s too late? Use this link: Thank you again. We’re going to report a number we can all be very proud of. \- Team Bernie Paid for by Bernie 2020 PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Border Asylum Crisis
body:
“A genuine crisis is building at the southern border as the perverse incentives of U.S. asylum law invite a surge of migrants that is...” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27072138b2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Border Asylum Crisis**

“A genuine crisis is building at the southern border as the perverse incentives of U.S. asylum law invite a surge of migrants that is overwhelming border security,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“Immigration has picked up over the last year as word has spread that parents with children who claim asylum can stay for years and perhaps forever . . . At the current rate, border apprehensions will exceed one million this year—the most since 2006—as human smugglers become more ambitious and reduce prices to entice more migrants.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=116f9c7932&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The job of newspapers was once to ‘comfort the afflicted and afflict the comfortable.’ Today, that job seems to be to give voice to liars and shout down the truth,” Charles Hurt writes in _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2a1b1e0d7&e=3ee4985eea)_. “No one has been given more airtime and ink to spread his lies than Rep. Adam Schiff, California Democrat, chairman of the House Intelligence Committee and chief prevaricator. That anyone this dishonest is allowed to hold a position of such importance and power in Congress tells you all you need to know about Washington these days.”
---
|
---
| In [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70341f08bb&e=3ee4985eea), Vice President Mike Pence writes that President Trump’s mission for NASA to return to the moon in five years is a worthy goal for America. “The president believes that, to be worthy of our great nation, our space program must pursue great things, including, above all, being the first nation to send astronauts to the moon in the 21st Century. And our administration will do whatever it takes to succeed.”
---
|
---
| “Conservatives have not had so triumphant a week since the fall of the Berlin Wall,” Michael Knowles writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3201d21da4&e=3ee4985eea). “The past two years have offered many successes, from President Trump’s victory in 2016 to the successful confirmation of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. But none so thoroughly demolished so dominant a leftist narrative as the collapse of the Russia collusion hoax.”
---
|
---
| “As President Trump doubles down on his pledge to build a southern border wall, Hispanics are showing broad support for him, according to a new survey,” Paul Bedard reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0998060897&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Some 50 percent of Hispanics approve of the president’s job, according to the latest McLaughlin & Associates poll of likely general election voters.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=132efa5cec&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c8b99de26&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=9b39d42a14)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

At the current rate, border apprehensions will exceed one million this year—the most since 2006—as human smugglers become more ambitious and reduce prices to entice more migrants.” | | “The job of newspapers was once to ‘comfort the afflicted and afflict the comfortable.’ Today, that job seems to be to give voice to liars and shout down the truth,” Charles Hurt writes in . “No one has been given more airtime and ink to spread his lies than Rep. Adam Schiff, California Democrat, chairman of the House Intelligence Committee and chief prevaricator. That anyone this dishonest is allowed to hold a position of such importance and power in Congress tells you all you need to know about Washington these days.” | | In , Vice President Mike Pence writes that President Trump’s mission for NASA to return to the moon in five years is a worthy goal for America. “The president believes that, to be worthy of our great nation, our space program must pursue great things, including, above all, being the first nation to send astronauts to the moon in the 21st Century. And our administration will do whatever it takes to succeed.” | | “Conservatives have not had so triumphant a week since the fall of the Berlin Wall,” Michael Knowles writes for . “The past two years have offered many successes, from President Trump’s victory in 2016 to the successful confirmation of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. But none so thoroughly demolished so dominant a leftist narrative as the collapse of the Russia collusion hoax.” | | “As President Trump doubles down on his pledge to build a southern border wall, Hispanics are showing broad support for him, according to a new survey,” Paul Bedard reports for the . “Some 50 percent of Hispanics approve of the president’s job, according to the latest McLaughlin & Associates poll of likely general election voters.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Mike Thompson
subject: humbling
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBT-xUiB3PahyjVxU7VrRQf4wP6M6hUcgZVUBpXUlMQ=/9Oorm1hlEm1xjO7qxVIHdfoQOoSF41mZqmkeptOEALY=)
Peter,

Once again I'm humbled by your incredible outpouring of support. Thanks so much to everyone who helped us reach our important FEC goal!

The work my Democratic colleagues and I do is only made possible with your continued dedication to fighting for our core values, and I'm so grateful to have you on our team.

As we keep fighting to defend our progress, make sure to add **info@mikethompsonforcongress.com** to your address book so you don't miss any updates from the team.

Be sure to also follow us on [**Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBT-xUiB3PahyjVxU7VrRQf4wP6M6hUcgZVUBpXUlMQ=/9Oorm1hlEm1xjO7qxVIHdfoQOoSF41mZqmkeptOEALY=) to keep up with everything happening in the district and on Capitol Hill!

Thanks again for all you do!

Let's keep it up.

Mike

* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBT-xUiB3PahyjVxU7VrRQf4wP6M6hUcgZVUBpXUlMQ=/I9Q1LkeREeENJBKmRXl_OuwQTEQ21y-uTLsdUJO1zDA=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_TY_90DO_190401_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

_We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBT-xUiB3PahyjVxU7VrRQf4wP6M6hUcgZVUBpXUlMQ=/AbvsvFU4MvwLUc5C3NaQ-Fyiy1Ru8JRDh106rQL8Omg=)_

name: BREAKING (via ProtectVoting.Org)
subject: Elizabeth Warren wants to ABOLISH the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- the Electoral College is undemocratic. Its existence allows just a handful of states to select our president. The Electoral College gave us George W. Bush. And Donald Trump. **So we 're TOTALLY PSYCHED that Elizabeth Warren isn't holding back:** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f572/3100376715/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/sign-on-today?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1") [**Add your name if you agree that it is absolutely time to ABOLISH the undemocratic Electoral College:**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f575/3100376715/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/sign-on-today?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree+that+it+is+ab&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1") | | | [Sign immediately ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f574/3100376715/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/sign-on-today?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+immediately+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1")
---
The Voter Protection Project is proud to announce we stand with Elizabeth Warren and support getting rid of the Electoral College.
Let's be clear: our president should be determined by a popular vote, so every vote from every state carries the same weight!
[**That 's why we are ready to work hard to support state-level initiatives in 2020 to eliminate the Electoral College and make Presidential elections fully democratic:**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f577/3100376715/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/sign-on-today?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+are+ready+to+work+hard&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1")
| | [Abolish the Electoral College ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f576/3100376715/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/sign-on-today?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Abolish+the+Electoral+College+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1")
---
Let's make our voices heard.
\-- Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f579/3100376715/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f578/3100376715/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0799/72412298/47095c50/6100f57b/3100376715/VEsO/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190401_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1")
